name: vision
description: Full classical computer-vision toolkit: image I/O, filters (blur/sharpen/emboss/edges), thresholding (fixed/Otsu/adaptive), morphology, connected-component blob detection, histograms, drawing, template matching, HSV color-range detection, and real Haar-cascade face detection (Viola-Jones). All native/fast, no ML framework required.
author: khandev1211-cpu
